channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bukayo Saka Signs 5-Year Deal With Arsenal To Become Club's Highest-Paid Player
item.description: Arsenal star Bukayo Saka has signed a new long-term contract, making him the highest paid player at the club.

item.title: 2026 UFL Uniforms: New, Updated Threads and Colorways for All 8 Teams
item.description: Here are the new and updated uniforms — home and away — for all eight teams ahead of the highly anticipated 2026 UFL season.

item.title: 2026 NCAA Tournament Projections: Iowa State Surges, Michigan State Falls
item.description: FOX Sports' bracket forecaster Mike DeCourcy offers up his latest men's NCAA Tournament projections.

item.title: Could Phil Foden Be Left Off England's 2026 World Cup Roster?
item.description: Phil Foden appeared to have put last season's struggles behind him towards the end of 2025, but he now appears to be suffering another dip at the wors...

item.title: AP College Basketball Players of the Week: Louisville's Brown, TCU's Miles
item.description: The Associated Press College Basketball Players of the Week for Week 15 are Louisville's Mikel Brown Jr. and TCU's Olivia Miles.

item.title: Cuban: NBA should 'embrace tanking' for fans
item.description: Mark Cuban, the former majority owner of the Dallas Mavericks, says the fan experience is chief among the reasons the NBA should "embrace tanking," an...

item.title: Moe, legendary former Nuggets coach, dies at 87
item.description: Doug Moe, who engineered one of the best offenses of its era as coach for the Denver Nuggets in the 1980s, has died at the age of 87.

item.title: Tiger won't rule out return at this year's Masters
item.description: Tiger Woods is not ruling out a return to professional golf as early as this year's Masters.

item.title: Sources: MLBPA's Clark resigns amid scandals
item.description: MLBPA executive director Tony Clark resigned Tuesday, leaving the union without its longtime leader less than a year before the expiration of MLB's co...

item.title: Frostad outduels USA's Forehand for big air gold
item.description: Tormod Frostad of Norway won the gold medal in big air freeskiing at the Milan Cortina Olympics, beating Mac Forehand of the United States on the last...
